sentences.arabic: نَتَنَاوَلُ الْفُطُورَ التَّقْلِيدِيَّ مَعَ الْعَائِلَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro doručkujemo tradicionalni doručak sa porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We eat a traditional breakfast with the family every morning.

sentences.arabic: نَأْكُلُ عَادَةً الْفَلَافِلَ وَالْحُمُّصَ بِزَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ.
sentences.translation: Obično jedemo falafel i hummus sa maslinovim uljem.
sentences.translationEn: We usually eat falafel and hummus with olive oil.

sentences.arabic: الشَّايُ السَّاخِنُ جُزْءٌ مُهِمٌّ مِنْ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vrući čaj je važan dio ovog obroka.
sentences.translationEn: Hot tea is an important part of this meal.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الطَّعَامُ يَمْنَحُنَا الطَّاقَةَ لِلْيَوْمِ كُلِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Ova hrana nam daje energiju za cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: This food gives us energy for the whole day.
